bead.title: Remove dbName/dbPath from control-plane GraphQL and SDK surfaces
bead.description: ADR-018 (docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-018-tenant-user-credential-model.md) dropped dbName/dbPath from the public model, and CONTRACT-002 (docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-002-graphql-surface.md) / CONTRACT-009 (docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-009-sdk-surface.md) no longer carry them. The control-plane GraphQL schema and sdk/typescript (e.g. sdk/typescript/src/graphql-client.ts) still expose dbName/dbPath fields. Remove them from the SDL, resolvers, and SDK types.
bead.acceptance: grep finds no dbName or dbPath in the control-plane GraphQL SDL/resolvers (crates/axon-server, crates/axon-control-plane) or in sdk/typescript/src; GraphQL contract tests (crates/axon-server/tests/control_graphql_test.rs, graphql_contract.rs) pass; cargo test and SDK typecheck pass.
